diff: All actions taken under a Curator role must be reported by the Curator in the Spark-Prime subsection of the Sky forum within 24 hours of submission. The report should include a transaction hash of the action, the UTC time at which the timelock period for the action elapses, a description of the action being implemented, and a link to the poll which provided governance approval for the action.
description:
Originating forum post: https://forum.skyeco.com/t/saep-13-risk-curation-framework/27796/1

**Do not merge unless associated poll passes**
